fields.name: ZigBee Mini Hub
fields.description: A compact smart home hub that connects and controls multiple ZigBee devices from a single interface. It enables seamless automation, remote control, and integration with other smart systems for improved home efficiency.
specs: Function: Smart Home Device Hub (Zigbee Gateway)
Device Support: Multiple Zigbee Smart Devices

fields.name: MixSwitch
fields.description: A Zigbee‑based smart wall switch panel that replaces traditional light switches to deliver both manual and automated control of lighting circuits. It supports 1‑gang to multi‑gang configurations, integrates with smart home systems via a Zigbee gateway, and enables scene creation, remote control, and coordinated lighting behaviors for improved home automation.

fields.name: Smart IP Camera
fields.description: A smart indoor surveillance camera that streams live video and detects motion, sending alerts to your mobile device through the HomeMate app. It includes features like night vision, two‑way audio for communication, and cloud or micro SD recording to monitor people, pets, or property remotely for enhanced home security.
specs: Features: Motion Detection + Night Vision + Two-Way Audio
Storage: Cloud Storage + MicroSD Card Support
Installation: Indoor Tabletop or Wall Mount

fields.name: Smart Magnetic Floodlight
fields.description: A Zigbee‑enabled magnetic track floodlight module designed for indoor smart lighting systems, providing a wide and even spread of ambient illumination. It integrates with compatible smart home controllers to support app control, scene automation, tunable white color temperature, and smooth dimming for adaptable lighting setups.
specs: Lighting Type: Magnetic Track Floodlight Module
Control: App Control + Scene Automation + Dimming
Installation: Magnetic Track Ceiling Mount System

fields.name: In Wall Switch
fields.description: Zigbee‑based smart retrofit module that converts traditional wired light switches into intelligent, app‑controlled switches without needing complex rewiring or a neutral line. Installed behind existing wall plates, it enables remote control, schedule automation, and integration with other ORVIBO smart devices through the HomeMate app or a Zigbee hub for unified lighting automation.
specs: Installation: In-Wall Retrofit Module (Behind Existing Switch Panel)
Control: App Control + Manual Wall Switch + Scene Automation

fields.name: Smart Magnetic Chandelier
fields.description: A modular smart lighting fixture that uses magnetic connectors for flexible assembly and placement, allowing tailored chandelier configurations. It connects via Zigbee to a smart home hub for remote control, scheduling, dimming, and scene integration, enabling adaptive ambient lighting with app or voice control.
specs: Lighting Type: Modular Magnetic LED Chandelier System
Control: App Control + Scene Automation + Dimming
Color Temperature: Adjustable White Light (Warm to Cool)

fields.name: MixPad M2
fields.description: A wall-mounted smart control panel with a built-in touchscreen that centralizes control of lighting, security, climate, and other smart devices. It functions as a Zigbee gateway and scene controller, enabling automation, real-time monitoring, and seamless interaction with the entire smart home ecosystem from a single interface.
specs: Functions: Smart Home Central Controller + Scene Automation

fields.name: MixPad Matter
fields.description: A smart wall control panel that acts as a central interface for managing connected home devices across lighting, security, and climate systems. It supports the Matter smart home standard, allowing interoperability with multiple brands and ecosystems while enabling scene control, automation, and unified device management from one screen.

fields.name: Door Sensor SM11
fields.description: A Zigbee-based smart door sensor designed to detect the opening and closing of doors or windows in real time. It triggers instant alerts and automation routines through a connected smart home hub, enabling improved security monitoring and energy-efficient control of other devices such as lights and alarms.

fields.name: Smoke Sensor
fields.description: A smart smoke sensor designed to detect early signs of smoke and potential fire hazards in real time. It triggers loud local alarms and sends instant notifications to a connected smart home system, enabling quick response and improved home safety.

fields.name: Water Leakage Sensor
fields.description: A smart water leakage sensor designed to detect the presence of water or flooding in real time from areas such as bathrooms, kitchens, or under appliances. It triggers instant alerts through a connected smart home hub, helping prevent water damage and enabling fast response to leaks.
specs: Detection Type: Conductive Water Sensing Probes
Alert: App Notification + Optional Alarm via Hub

fields.name: Adebayo Olamide
fields.text: Clean installation and it blends nicely with my wall finish. Works reliably with my smart setup and has been stable so far.

fields.name: Ifeoma Chukwuemeka
fields.text: The switch is solid and modern, but pairing it with my hub took some trial and error before it worked properly.

fields.name: Chinedu Okafor
fields.text: Very responsive and looks premium compared to regular switches. Automation features work smoothly once configured.

fields.name: Oluwatoyin Balogun
fields.text: It functions well, but I expected a more intuitive setup process. Not very beginner-friendly out of the box.

fields.name: Emmanuel Nwafor
fields.text: Stable performance and no disconnections since installation. It has made controlling my lights much easier.

fields.name: Amaka Nnaji
fields.text: Good product overall, but the app response sometimes delays by a second or two.

fields.name: Segun Adeyemi
fields.text: Works as expected and gives a clean smart-home upgrade. Build quality feels durable and premium.

fields.name: Ngozi Ume
fields.text: It’s okay for basic control, but I think it needs better instructions for first-time users.

fields.name: Chinedu Okafor
fields.text: Easy to set up and it connected all my Zigbee devices quickly. Has been stable since installation.

fields.name: Adebayo Olumide
fields.text: Works well overall, but I had to restart it once during initial pairing. After that, it’s been fine.

fields.name: Ifeoma Nwosu
fields.text: Compact design is a plus and it doesn’t take space. Integration with my smart switches is smooth.

fields.name: Emeka Ugochukwu
fields.text: It gets the job done, but the setup process wasn’t very beginner-friendly. Took some trial and error.

fields.name: Oluwaseun Adeyemi
fields.text: Very reliable hub. My lights and sensors respond faster now compared to my old setup.

fields.name: Ngozi Chukwu
fields.text: Performance is solid, but I wish the app gave more detailed feedback during pairing.

fields.name: Daniel Olatunji
fields.text: Strong connectivity and no drops so far. It handles multiple devices without issues.

fields.name: Hauwa Abdullahi
fields.text: Decent camera for home monitoring. I like the recording options, but app notifications can be delayed sometimes.

fields.name: Yakubu Danladi
fields.text: Strong performance and easy integration with other smart devices in my home system.

fields.name: Peter Njoroge
fields.text: Works fine for basic security needs. Not the most advanced camera, but it’s dependable.

fields.name: Grace Nkansah
fields.text: Good build quality and clear daytime footage. Setup instructions could be improved.

fields.name: Mark Thompson
fields.text: Solid performance overall. Remote access works smoothly and hasn’t failed so far.

fields.name: Chukwuemeka Eze
fields.text: Bright and clean lighting. The magnetic track system makes repositioning very easy without tools.

fields.name: Oluwafunmilayo Akinyemi
fields.text: Good ambient lighting, but I had to fine-tune placement to avoid uneven coverage in my living room.

fields.name: Abdullahi Sani
fields.text: Solid product. It integrates well with my smart home setup and responds quickly to commands.

fields.name: Bisi Afolabi
fields.text: Works fine overall, but I expected slightly higher brightness for larger rooms.

fields.name: Adaora Nwachukwu
fields.text: Very smooth dimming and color temperature control. It creates a nice mood in the evenings.

fields.name: Ikenna Maduka
fields.text: Clean retrofit solution. It fits behind my existing wall plate and works reliably with my Zigbee setup.

fields.name: Oluwafunmilayo Akinyemi
fields.text: Good product overall, but installation required a bit of electrical understanding to get right.

fields.name: Esther Idowu
fields.text: Decent switch module. Occasionally takes a second to respond in the app, but nothing major.

fields.name: Aisha Mohammed
fields.text: Works well with my Zigbee hub. Installation was straightforward for my electrician.

fields.name: Victor Ojo
fields.text: Solid performance and clean integration, but app response can be slightly delayed at times.

fields.name: Tariq Bello
fields.text: Strong visual impact and flexible layout options. Lighting transitions are smooth and create a premium feel.

fields.name: Ngozi Anozie
fields.text: Looks elegant in my living room, but initial setup took longer than expected.

fields.name: Seun Adegoke
fields.text: Decent performance overall. It works well, but I’ve had a few moments where one module didn’t respond immediately.

fields.name: Zainab Yusuf
fields.text: Not impressed. The brightness is uneven across modules and doesn’t fully light up my space.

fields.name: Musa Ibrahim
fields.text: Below expectations. Connectivity issues made setup frustrating and inconsistent.

fields.name: Jan Novak
fields.text: Good smart lighting system overall, but pricing feels a bit high compared to alternatives.

fields.name: Femi Adegbola
fields.text: Very solid central control panel. I like having lighting and security controls in one place.

fields.name: Chioma Umeh
fields.text: Works well and feels premium, but the interface took me a bit of time to understand fully.

fields.name: Suleiman Adamu
fields.text: Good device overall. It controls my smart home reliably, but setup wasn’t very straightforward.

fields.name: Kehinde Oladipo
fields.text: Not bad, but I expected faster response when switching between scenes.

fields.name: Ibrahim Danjuma
fields.text: Very reliable after setup. It has made controlling my home automation much easier.

fields.name: Aminu Garba
fields.text: Very good smart panel. It connects different devices easily and keeps everything in one control point.

fields.name: Ezinne Okechukwu
fields.text: Solid performance, but the interface took some time to get used to at first.

fields.name: Babatunde Salami
fields.text: Works fine overall, but I noticed slight delays when switching between complex scenes.

fields.name: Luca Bianchi
fields.text: Decent device, but I feel the price is a bit high for what it currently offers.

fields.name: Ugochukwu Madu
fields.text: Very useful for monitoring doors. Integrates smoothly with my alarm system.

fields.name: Temitope Akinwale
fields.text: Decent device, but battery cover feels a bit flimsy.

fields.name: Chuwkudi Chukwu
fields.text: Not very stable at first. It disconnected once, but has been fine since I re-paired it.

fields.name: Nkechi Omeh
fields.text: Loud alarm and fast detection. Gives peace of mind knowing it responds quickly to smoke.

fields.name: Aliyu Bashir
fields.text: Works well, but I tested it and the alarm is quite sensitive even to light smoke.

fields.name: Seun Adebiran
fields.text: Works fine, but battery life could be better based on my usage.

fields.name: Chiamaka Okoye
fields.text: Very helpful device. It detected a small kitchen leak early and saved me from damage.

fields.name: Yakubu Danjuma
fields.text: Works as expected, but sometimes takes a second or two before sending alerts.

fields.name: Grace Nkansah
fields.text: Reliable and simple to use. I placed it under my sink and it works perfectly.
